title: OCS/GCS qconf scheduler configuration schema
description: Schema describing the JSON produced and consumed by qconf -fmt json -ssconf / -Msconf: the scheduler configuration.

schedule_interval.description: Interval at which scheduling runs are triggered (time value).

maxujobs.description: Maximum number of jobs a single user may have running at once (0 = unlimited).

queue_sort_method.description: Order in which queue instances are sorted for scheduling.

job_load_adjustments.description: Per-load-value adjustments applied to a host for each job started on it.

load_adjustment_decay_time.description: Time over which the job load adjustments decay (time value).

load_formula.description: Algebraic load formula used to derive a single load value per host.

schedd_job_info.description: Whether/which scheduler job information is kept for qstat -j (true, false, or 'job_list <ids>').

flush_submit_sec.description: Seconds after a job submission before a scheduling run is flushed (0 = disabled).

flush_finish_sec.description: Seconds after a job finishes before a scheduling run is flushed (0 = disabled).

reprioritize_interval.description: Interval at which running jobs are reprioritized (time value; 0 disables).

halftime.description: Half-life (in hours) for decaying accumulated usage in the share tree policy.

usage_weight_list.description: Weights of the usage metrics (cpu, mem, io) combining into a single usage value.

compensation_factor.description: Factor controlling how aggressively the share tree compensates for past under-usage.

weight_user.description: Relative weight of the user shares in the functional policy.

weight_project.description: Relative weight of the project shares in the functional policy.

weight_department.description: Relative weight of the department shares in the functional policy.

weight_job.description: Relative weight of the job shares in the functional policy.

weight_tickets_functional.description: Total number of functional policy tickets.

weight_tickets_share.description: Total number of share tree policy tickets.

share_override_tickets.description: Whether override tickets are shared among the tasks of a parallel/array job.

share_functional_shares.description: Whether functional shares are shared among the tasks of a parallel/array job.

max_functional_jobs_to_schedule.description: Maximum number of pending jobs considered by the functional policy per scheduling run.

report_pjob_tickets.description: Whether per-job tickets are reported to qstat.

max_pending_tasks_per_job.description: Maximum number of pending array task ranges considered per array job.

halflife_decay_list.description: Per-usage-metric half-life decay specification, or NONE.

policy_hierarchy.description: Order in which the ticket policies (Override, Functional, Share-tree) are applied.

weight_ticket.description: Weight of the normalized ticket value in the overall job priority.

weight_waiting_time.description: Weight of the job waiting time in the overall job priority.

weight_deadline.description: Weight of the deadline urgency in the overall job priority.

weight_urgency.description: Weight of the normalized urgency value in the overall job priority.

weight_priority.description: Weight of the normalized POSIX priority in the overall job priority.

max_reservation.description: Maximum number of advance/backfill resource reservations made per scheduling run (0 = disabled).

default_duration.description: Default runtime assumed for jobs without an explicit runtime limit (time value or INFINITY).
